privacy_boundary: Public-safe summary only. Detailed local skill names, descriptions, and per-skill paths are intentionally excluded from this publishable artifact.

excluded_scope_summary.reason: System skills and SkillGuard fixture skills are not user-created upgraded skill targets for this audit.

repairs_and_cleanup: Added phase_native_bindings to installed user-created native/hybrid SkillGuard contracts where missing.
Kept skillguard-runtime contracts with empty phase_native_bindings.
Synchronized installed SkillGuard and skillguard-global-router from the upgraded source skill directories.
Synchronized FlowPilot installed .skillguard layer from the FlowPilot source worktree.
Removed transient nested .agents output and restored FlowPilot noise-only simulation metadata changes.
claim_boundary: This summary proves only the local SkillGuard scan and repair classification performed during this task. It does not publish private per-skill details and does not prove future skill behavior.
